title: Aurora, 31369, Mini Flopsies Mr Pugster Pug, 8In, Soft Toy, Brown and Black
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: Product Description Aurora World’s highly popular Mini Flopsies range brings you an extremely cute and cuddly Pug Dog. Made using the finest plush materials, this golden brown and black Pug Dog has a floppy bean bag body and is perfect as a gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Box Contains 1 x Aurora World Ltd Mini Flopsies Mr Pugster Pug 8In
